queries.question: Display journalists and editors with English language proficiency.
queries.sql:
SELECT Journalists.name
FROM Journalists
WHERE Journalists.language_proficiency = "English"
UNION
SELECT Editors.name
FROM Editors
WHERE Editors.language_proficiency = "English"
